title: haplopappus maulinus
intro: Haplopappus maulinus, also known as Hairy Goldenaster, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Haplopappus maulinus include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used topically as a salve or poultice.
